purpose: To build an e-commerce web platform where customers can browse products, manage cart, checkout, and view orders.
roles: End user who browses products, adds to cart, checks out, and views order history - Customer
User with access to manage products and view orders - Admin
workflows: Customer navigates through product listings and filters based on criteria - Product Browsing
Customer adds, removes, or updates quantities of items in the cart - Cart Management
Customer proceeds to checkout, enters shipping and payment details, and confirms order - Checkout Process
Customer views past orders and their status - Order History
business_rules: Inventory must be updated after order placement
Cart items must be cleared after successful checkout
Order status must be updated from 'pending' to 'confirmed' upon successful payment
assumptions: Inventory data can be sample data
Admin authentication can be basic for MVP

functional_requirements.title: Browse Products
functional_requirements.description: Customers shall be able to browse products with filtering and sorting capabilities.

acceptance_criteria.description: User can filter products by category, price range, and brand

functional_requirements.title: View Product Details
functional_requirements.description: Customers shall be able to view detailed information of a product.

acceptance_criteria.description: Product details include name, description, price, images, and inventory status

functional_requirements.title: Manage Shopping Cart
functional_requirements.description: Customers shall be able to add, remove, and update quantities of items in the cart.

acceptance_criteria.description: Cart updates are reflected in real-time and persist during session

functional_requirements.title: Checkout Process
functional_requirements.description: Customers shall be able to proceed through checkout with shipping and payment information.

acceptance_criteria.description: Checkout process includes shipping address, payment method, and order review

functional_requirements.title: Place Order
functional_requirements.description: Customers shall be able to submit an order after completing checkout.

acceptance_criteria.description: Order confirmation is displayed with order number and expected delivery date

functional_requirements.title: View Order History
functional_requirements.description: Customers shall be able to view their past orders and their status.

acceptance_criteria.description: Order history displays order number, date, items, total amount, and status

functional_requirements.title: Admin Product Management
functional_requirements.description: Admin users shall be able to add, update, and delete products.

acceptance_criteria.description: Admin can upload product images, set price, and manage inventory levels

non_functional_requirements.description: The system shall load product listings within 2 seconds.

acceptance_criteria.description: Page load time for product listings is under 2 seconds on average

non_functional_requirements.description: User authentication and session management must be secure.

acceptance_criteria.description: User sessions are secured with token-based authentication

non_functional_requirements.description: The interface shall be intuitive and responsive across devices.

acceptance_criteria.description: UI is responsive and usable on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices

use_cases.title: Browse Products
preconditions: User is logged in or anonymous
main_flow: Customer navigates to product listing page
Customer applies filters or sorts items

use_cases.title: Add Product to Cart
preconditions: Product is visible and in stock

use_cases.title: Complete Checkout
preconditions: Cart contains at least one item
main_flow: Customer enters shipping and payment details
System processes order and displays confirmation

use_cases.title: View Order History
main_flow: Customer navigates to order history page
System displays list of past orders
Customer selects an order to view details

use_cases.title: Admin Manage Products
main_flow: Admin navigates to product management page
Admin adds or edits product details
